description: You are a new satellite operations engineer at a university space lab. Clean up the GPredict installation by deleting the 'Bogus_Test' ground station (0 N, 0 E) and the 'Old_Demo' module. Update the 'Houston' ground station altitude to 14 meters without changing its coordinates. In the 'Research' module, remove SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849) and FENGYUN 3A (NORAD 32958), ensuring only ISS ZARYA (NORAD 25544), ISS POISK (NORAD 36086), and ISS NAUKA (NORAD 49044) remain. Add a ground station for the Svalbard Satellite Station (Name: Svalbard, Latitude: 78.2297 N, Longitude: 15.3888 E, Altitude: 458 meters) and configure it as the default ground station in the application preferences. Do not modify the Amateur module. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
